SUBSEC.A: RESCISSIONS∧CANCELLATIONS CONTINUE (§101,TAFS)  
  CRITERION1: TAFS WITH NO OTHER-APPROPRIATIONS IN ACT ∧ APPLICABLE-TAFS RECEIVES APPROPRIATION  
  CRITERION2: NO-YEAR-TAFS RECEIVE OTHER-APPROPRIATIONS IN ACT  
  METHOD: REDUCE §101 OPERATIONS-RATE FOR APPLICABLE-TAFS  
  CONDITION: NO IMPINGEMENT ON CONGRESS’ FINAL-FUNDING-PREROGATIVES  
DEF: APPLICABLE-APPROPRIATIONS-ACT(APPL-ACT)  
SUBSEC.B: CONTINUATION-AMOUNT=MIN(  
  SPECIFIED-RESCISSION-AMOUNT IN APPL-ACT (§101),  
  BALANCES-AVAILABLE AS OF DATE:2024-10-01 FROM SPECIFIED-FUNDS IN APPL-ACT (§101)  
)  
DEF: HC∧SC-APP=HOUSE ∧ SENATE COMMITTEES ON APPROPRIATIONS

SUBSEC.C: LIST UPDATES FOR BALANCE-CHANGES AT DATE:2024-10-01 ∧ TRANSMIT ON REQUEST→HC∧SC-APP
